prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:What is the cost of the MyElite Loyalty Program?
response: The MyElite Loyalty Program costs 99 USD per year. This fee is non-refundable, even if you cancel the membership.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:Can I cancel my MyElite Loyalty Program membership?
response: Yes, you can cancel your membership at any time. However, you will still enjoy the benefits until the end of your subscription period.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:What benefits do I get with the MyElite Loyalty Program?
response: You get extended support for wear and tear for up to 2 years and up to 2 accidental replacements per year. Members also enjoy early access to sales events, up to 2% cashback, and free expedited shipping.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:How many accidental replacements are allowed per year?
response: You are allowed up to 2 accidental replacements per year per product. A surcharge of 30% of the sales price applies to each replacement.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:Is the MyElite Loyalty Program available in all states?
response: The MyElite Loyalty Program is available to residents of the 48 contiguous states of the USA. Loss coverage is only available in New York, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:What is the surcharge for accidental replacements?
response: The surcharge for accidental replacements under the program is 30% of the product's sales price. This charge applies to each replacement you request.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:How much cashback can I earn as a member?
response: As a member, you can earn up to 2% cashback on purchases. The cashback is paid annually via a gift card, with a maximum of 1000 USD per year.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:When do members get access to sales events?
response: Members get early access to major sales events like Black Friday, Labor Day, Cyber Monday, and Christmas. This early access helps members secure the best deals before others.

prompt: [MyElite Loyalty Program FAQ]:What states offer loss coverage with the MyElite Loyalty Program?
response: Loss coverage is available only in New York, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania. A copay of 25% of the product cost applies for loss coverage.

response: No, there are no refunds if you cancel your membership. However, you will continue to enjoy the membership benefits until the end of your subscription period.
